parameters.jsonBody: ={{ { session_id: $('Normalize Request').item.json.session_id, node_id: $('Normalize Request').item.json.node_id, surface: $('Normalize Request').item.json.surface, metadata_json: { user_id: $('Normalize Request').item.json.user_id, message_id: $('Normalize Request').item.json.message_id, source: 'openwebui.pipe' } } }}

={{ { run_id: $('Normalize Request').item.json.run_id, session_id: $('Normalize Request').item.json.session_id, run_kind: 'openwebui.n8n.pipe', status: 'started', metadata_json: { source: 'openwebui.pipe', user_id: $('Normalize Request').item.json.user_id } } }}

parameters.query:
SELECT table_schema, table_name
FROM information_schema.tables
WHERE table_schema IN ('public', 'broker')
  AND table_type = 'BASE TABLE'
ORDER BY table_schema, table_name;

parameters.jsonBody: ={{ { run_id: $('Normalize Request').item.json.run_id, session_id: $('Normalize Request').item.json.session_id, run_kind: 'openwebui.n8n.pipe', status: 'completed', metadata_json: { source: 'openwebui.pipe', user_id: $('Normalize Request').item.json.user_id, table_count: (() => { const names = String($json.concatenated_table_name || '').split(',').filter(Boolean); return names.length; })() } } }}

={{ { event_id: $('Normalize Request').item.json.event_id, event_type: 'workflow.completed', payload_version: 1, node_id: $('Normalize Request').item.json.node_id, session_id: $('Normalize Request').item.json.session_id, run_id: $('Normalize Request').item.json.run_id, idempotency_key: $('Normalize Request').item.json.idempotency_key, occurred_at: $('Normalize Request').item.json.occurred_at, payload_json: { chat_input: $('Normalize Request').item.json.chat_input, table_count: (() => { const names = String($('Summarize').item.json.concatenated_table_name || '').split(',').filter(Boolean); return names.length; })(), tables: (() => { const names = String($('Summarize').item.json.concatenated_table_name || '').split(',').filter(Boolean); const schemas = String($('Summarize').item.json.concatenated_table_schema || '').split(',').filter(Boolean); return names.map((name, index) => `${schemas[index]}.${name}`); })() }, metadata_json: { source: 'openwebui.pipe', user_id: $('Normalize Request').item.json.user_id, webhook_path: 'prototype-postgres-tables' } } }}

assignments.name: output
assignments.value: ={{ (() => { const names = String($('Summarize').item.json.concatenated_table_name || '').split(',').filter(Boolean); const schemas = String($('Summarize').item.json.concatenated_table_schema || '').split(',').filter(Boolean); const pairs = names.map((name, index) => `${schemas[index]}.${name}`); const preview = pairs.slice(0, 20).join(', '); const remainder = Math.max(pairs.length - 20, 0); const suffix = remainder > 0 ? ` (+${remainder} more)` : ''; return `Prototype tables: ${preview}${suffix}\nContinuity recorded: session=${$('Normalize Request').item.json.session_id}, run=${$('Normalize Request').item.json.run_id}, event=${$('Normalize Request').item.json.event_id}`; })() }}

assignments.name: tables
assignments.value: ={{ (() => { const names = String($('Summarize').item.json.concatenated_table_name || '').split(',').filter(Boolean); const schemas = String($('Summarize').item.json.concatenated_table_schema || '').split(',').filter(Boolean); return names.map((name, index) => `${schemas[index]}.${name}`); })() }}
